## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Architecture Impact

- [ ] Requires new package
- [ ] Requires ADR
- [ ] Affects `@repo/ui` / `@repo/core` / apps

## Target Sprint

Which sprint should this land in? (see docs/ROADMAP.md)

## Additional Context

Links, mockups, references.
